home.tagline: FirstClass Immobilier, Licensed Real Estate Developer.
home.subTagline: Leader in its sectors of activity.
home.statement: With us, rest assured — real estate is done and lived differently.

licensed.title: Licensed developer
licensed.body: Official license from the Ministry of Construction — every program backed by regulated paperwork.

experience.title: 8+ years delivering
experience.body: From Cocody to the countryside: hundreds of families settled into their new home.

acd.title: ACD secured
acd.body: 380+ title deeds (ACD) delivered — the only guarantee you truly own the land.

diaspora.title: Diaspora-friendly
diaspora.body: Remote reservations, online file tracking, notary hand-off in Abidjan on your behalf.

featured.title: Flagship programs on sale
featured.subtitle: Hand-picked developments with lots still available. Reserve online and book a site visit.
featured.empty: New programs are coming online soon — follow us to be notified.

products.title: From plot to key
products.subtitle: One team handles the full cycle — identify the land, secure the paperwork, build, and hand over.

land.title: Serviced land
land.body: Parceled, surveyed, ACD-ready lots in Abidjan and surrounding cities.

house.title: Turn-key homes
house.body: Architect-designed villas delivered fully finished, with warranties.

lotissement.title: Subdivisions
lotissement.body: Full neighborhood developments — roads, utilities, security, common areas.

support.title: Buyer support
support.body: Contract, notary, ACD, handover — a dedicated agent from signature to keys.

cta.title: Ready to start your real-estate project?
cta.subtitle: Tell us what you're looking for and an agent will get back to you within 24 hours.

about.title: About Us
about.bio: Founded in Côte d’Ivoire in January 2018, FirstClass Immobilier is a leader in its sectors. Licensed under number 22-00109/MCLU/DGLCV/CAPPI/ogla, our company specialises in several key domains. We contribute to harmonious urban development and improve the quality of life of our clientele.
about.values: Client satisfaction · Honesty · Responsibility · Quality · Commitment · Trust.
about.vision: Become a leader in real estate in Côte d’Ivoire and around the world, by offering top-tier housing solutions that meet international standards.
about.mission: At FirstClass Immobilier, client satisfaction is at the heart of everything we do.
about.products: Raw, semi-serviced and fully-serviced land · High-end duplex villas with or without pool · Mid, high and ultra-high standard apartments · Social housing (flats and villas).

services.title: Our Services
services.intro: Six complementary disciplines under one roof, to deliver every project end-to-end.

promotion.title: Real-estate development
promotion.body: Our developments stand out for their contemporary design and functionality. Each project is built in partnership with renowned architects and sector experts, blending aesthetics, comfort and durability.
bullets: Prime locations: shops, schools, transit, business hubs.
Premium quality at accessible price points.

amenagement.title: Land development
amenagement.lede: Make the most of your parcel.
amenagement.body: We unlock the potential of your land thanks to deep regulatory knowledge and a strategic approach. We create functional and beautiful outdoor spaces.
bullets: Site works: clearing, roads, water, electricity.

construction.title: Construction
construction.body: Our construction teams deliver high-quality buildings, on time and on budget. Premium materials and modern techniques ensure durability and safety on every project.
bullets: Quality and safety: top materials and modern techniques.
Strict respect for deadlines and budgets.
Dedicated, experienced team at every stage.

renovation.title: Building renovation
renovation.lede: Bring your buildings back to life.
renovation.body: An experienced crew with mastery of modern renovation techniques, premium materials and rigorous management to deliver on time and on budget.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.body: A structured architecture department whose team is registered with the Order of Architects of Côte d’Ivoire. Innovative, durable, beautiful solutions — from concept to delivery.

transaction.title: Real-estate transactions
transaction.body: Specialists in real-estate transactions: buy, sell and rent. A strong network of buyers and sellers, transparent and professional at every step.

realisations.title: Our Work
realisations.intro: Explore our delivered projects across Abidjan, Greater Abidjan, inland, and beyond.

featured.title: Featured
featured.intro: Our flagship programs currently on sale and curated land offers by zone.

saveSearch.toastDescription: Search added to your favorites — find it in your client area.
saveSearch.toastError: Action failed. Please try again in a moment.

activities.title: Activities
activities.intro: Events, openings, signing ceremonies, and company life.

team.title: Our Team
team.intro: A multidisciplinary team at the service of your real estate project.

contact.title: Contact
contact.applyIntro: Send a spontaneous application. Attach your résumé and briefly describe your profile.
contact.feedbackIntro: Share feedback, a suggestion, or a need. We will get back to you quickly.

dashboardIntro.buyer: Track your purchases, payments and construction progress.
dashboardIntro.prospect: Reserve lots, book visits, and follow your requests.
dashboardIntro.applicant: Track the status of your application.
dashboardIntro.visitor: Welcome to your FirstClass Immobilier workspace.

portal.emptyCta: Welcome! Discover our programs and reserve your first lot.
portal.noApplication: You haven’t applied yet. Head to
portal.messagesComingSoon: In-app messaging is on the way. For now, reach us on WhatsApp.

applicationStatus.received: Application received. We will get back to you.
applicationStatus.interview: We’d like to invite you for an interview.
applicationStatus.rejected: Your application wasn’t retained this time.

portal.documentsIntro: Upload each required document. Your agent will review and approve, or ask for a new version if something is wrong.
portal.docUploadSuccess: Document uploaded. Your agent will review it shortly.

auth.signInIntro: Sign in to access your client portal or the admin area.

admin.dashboardIntro: Overview of activity across the platform.

descriptions.programs: Create, edit, and publish real-estate programs.
descriptions.lots: Manage every lot across your programs. Click a row to edit its content, media, and virtual tour.
descriptions.reservations: Prospects that clicked Reserve on a lot. Confirm to convert into a Sale.
descriptions.sales: Every confirmed sale, from draft to completion.
descriptions.appointments: Visit requests, office meetings and calls. Confirm or assign to an agent.
descriptions.chat: Every ongoing conversation with buyers, prospects and applicants.
descriptions.analytics: Last 30 days of visitor activity and the conversion funnel feeding your pipeline.
descriptions.leads: « Vos Avis » submissions and other inbound leads. Move through the pipeline.
descriptions.applications: Spontaneous job applications from the Postuler form.
descriptions.activities: Events, openings and company life. Published entries appear on the public « Nos Activités » tab.
descriptions.team: People shown on the « Nos Équipes » tab. Reorder by changing the order number.
descriptions.partners: Logos shown in the « Nos Partenaires & Clients » strip on Nous Découvrir.
descriptions.stats: These numbers power the animated counters on Accueil and Nos Réalisations.
descriptions.users: Directory of every account. Promote staff, downgrade inactive buyers, or search for a specific person.
descriptions.settings: Contact details, social URLs and footer copy shown across the public site.

empty.reservations: No reservations yet. As soon as a prospect clicks Reserve on a lot, it appears here.

deleteProgram.title: Delete this program?
deleteProgram.description: This permanently removes {count} lots, their media and related reservations. This cannot be undone.

deleteLot.title: Delete this lot?
deleteLot.description: Deletes this lot and all its media. Any prior reservations stay attached to the program for traceability.

deleteActivity.title: Delete this activity?
deleteActivity.description: The post will be removed from the public “Activities” page immediately. This cannot be undone.

cancelSale.title: Cancel this sale?
cancelSale.description: The client portal will flip to cancelled. Payments and documents remain for audit. The lot is not automatically re-listed.

program.slugHint: Used in URLs, e.g. aerocity-beach. Lowercase letters, digits, dashes only.
program.name: Name
program.featuredToggle: Feature on “À la Une” homepage section

lot.referenceHint: Unique within the program. Example: AERO-A01
lot.title: Title
lot.highlightsHint: Short bullet-style summary shown on cards.
lot.featuresHint: One feature per line. Stored as a JSON array — e.g. "Pool\nSmart home\nPrivate garden"
lot.virtualTourHint: Embedded as an iframe on the lot detail page.
lot.videoUrl: Video URL (direct mp4 or YouTube/Vimeo embed)

settings.sectionContactHint: Shown in the footer and on the Contacts page.
settings.sectionSocialHint: Shown as icon links in the footer. Leave blank to hide.
settings.sectionFooterHint: Overrides the default slogan shown under the logo in the footer.
settings.sectionSchedulerHint: Weekly windows offered to prospects when they request an on-site visit. Each slot runs for the configured duration.
settings.sectionLegalHint: Used on Mentions légales. Required by Ivorian law for any commercial website. Filling these disables the placeholder markers on the public legal pages.

notFound.title: This page doesn’t exist anymore
notFound.description: The link may be outdated or the program was withdrawn. Use the shortcuts below to get back on track.

error.title: Temporary glitch on our side
error.description: Our team has been notified. Please retry in a moment — or reach out if the problem persists.

banner.title: We respect your choice
banner.description: We use strictly necessary cookies to run this site and, with your consent, internal analytics to understand how visitors use our programs.

assistant.title: FCI Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Programs, pricing, reservations — always online.
assistant.footnote: Automated assistant · for a human, click Talk to an agent.
assistant.leadSuccessBody: An agent will get back to you within 24 hours.
assistant.leadConfirmed: Got it — an FCI agent will reach out shortly. Anything else I can help with while you wait?

lead.intro: Leave your details and an FCI agent will get back to you within 24 hours.
lead.name: Full name

lot.none: No lots published yet. Check back soon.
lot.visitIntro: Book an on-site visit — our agent will reach out to confirm the slot.

share.messageTemplate: Check out this {type} from FirstClass Immobilier — {name} in {zone}, {price}.

simulator.title: Simulate a payment plan
simulator.subtitle: Get an indicative monthly payment by adjusting deposit and duration.
simulator.disclaimer: Indicative only — excludes notary fees and ACD. The final plan is set in the contract.

save.failed: Action failed. Please try again in a moment.
